inputs.label: Equipment Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of machinery, computers, furniture, and other equipment.

inputs.label: Legal & Permit Cost
inputs.businessContext: Legal fees, business registration, permits, and licenses.

inputs.label: Deposit Cost
inputs.businessContext: Rental deposits, utility deposits, and other refundable deposits.

inputs.label: Initial Inventory Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of initial stock, raw materials, or finished goods.

inputs.label: Marketing Launch Cost
inputs.businessContext: Marketing, advertising, and promotional expenses for launch.

inputs.label: Working Capital
inputs.businessContext: Cash reserve to cover initial operating expenses before revenue.

formulas.totalStartupCost: equipmentCost + legalAndPermitCost + depositCost + initialInventoryCost + marketingLaunchCost + workingCapital
